things.name: George Town Historic District
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage colonial city with the finest collection of pre-war buildings in Asia

things.name: Penang Street Art
things.description: Ironwork sculptures and painted murals by Ernest Zacharevic throughout George Town

things.name: Penang Hill (Bukit Bendera)
things.description: Cable car to the summit with colonial bungalows, an owl museum and cooler temperatures

things.name: Kek Lok Si Temple
things.description: Southeast Asia's largest Buddhist temple complex with a 36m bronze Kuan Yin statue

things.name: Penang National Park
things.description: Smallest national park in Malaysia with pristine beaches and a turtle sanctuary

things.name: Clan Jetties
things.description: Chinese clan house villages built on stilts over the water - unique heritage communities

things.name: Penang Food Trail
things.description: Char kway teow, assam laksa, cendol and rojak - Penang is Malaysia's food capital

things.name: Little India (Brickfields)
things.description: Bustling Indian quarter with temples, sari shops and the best roti canai on the island

things.name: Cheong Fatt Tze Mansion (Blue Mansion)
things.description: UNESCO-award winning 38-room indigo blue Victorian mansion open for tours

things.name: Batu Ferringhi Beach
things.description: North coast resort beach with a famous night market and watersports
